task.json.text: Rotate the refresh token after every successful /session/refresh request; reject replay of the previous token; preserve the token-family ID; return the replacement token; and do not change password-reset behavior.

workUnits.title: Rotate the refresh-token signer with an explicit migration boundary
Implement the GraphReFly refresh rotation flow
workUnits.intent: Rotate and persist the replacement refresh token.

blueprintClaims.statement: The online session mutation may persist directly under session-writes.v1.

workUnits.title: Expose the refresh HTTP adapter
workUnits.intent: Return the replacement token and reject replay.

blueprintClaims.statement: The adapter depends on an accepted U2 runtime.

diffs/u1.json.patch:
diff --git a/src/session/contracts.ts b/src/session/contracts.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6acd119
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/session/contracts.ts
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+export interface RefreshResult { token: string; familyId: string }
diff --git a/tests/session/contracts.test.ts b/tests/session/contracts.test.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..609d6bd
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/session/contracts.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+// token-family and replay-rejection contract

diffs/u3.json.patch:
diff --git a/src/http/refresh-route.ts b/src/http/refresh-route.ts
index 4fcf305..9b37dd7 100644
--- a/src/http/refresh-route.ts
+++ b/src/http/refresh-route.ts
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 import { refresh } from '../session/flows/refresh-flow.js';
-export const postRefresh = refresh;
+export function postRefresh(token: string) { return { status: 200, body: refresh(token) }; }
diff --git a/tests/http/refresh-route.test.ts b/tests/http/refresh-route.test.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6003740
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/http/refresh-route.test.ts
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+// HTTP adapter returns replacement token
